panels.name: Post-transplant Labs (~2 months)
panels.preview: Recovered graft function: bilirubin 0.9, INR 1.1, albumin 3.8, AST/ALT normal. Na 139, Cr 1.0. Platelets recovering (118 K). Tacrolimus trough therapeutic.

panels.name: MICU Labs — Flash Pulmonary Edema
panels.preview: Respiratory failure picture. BNP markedly elevated (high). Liver numbers near her baseline (bili 4.8, INR 2.1, Plt 52). Na 130, Cr 1.5. Troponin negative. No leukocytosis / afebrile.

panels.name: ED Presentation Labs (TP1)
panels.preview: Na 128, BUN 32, Cr 1.4. Hgb 10.1, Plt 55 K. INR 2.0. Bilirubin 4.5, albumin 2.6. MELD-Na ~27. Decompensated cirrhosis labs; coagulopathy and thrombocytopenia of liver disease.

panels.name: Hepatology Labs — Diuretic Intolerance
panels.preview: After diuretic up-titration: Cr risen to 1.6 (from ~1.1 baseline), K 5.6 (hyperkalemia), Na 126 (hyponatremia). Documents that higher diuretic doses are NOT tolerated — basis for referral for mechanical drainage.
